description_long: This house features a single-story, rectangular layout with multiple interconnected rooms and a flat roof. The exterior walls are clad in a light brown brick pattern, while the windows and doors are framed in white, providing a clean contrast. Large, evenly spaced windows line the longer facades, allowing for ample natural light inside. The interior layout includes several partitioned spaces, likely representing bedrooms, living areas, and utility rooms, with visible doorways and some built-in fixtures. The main entryway is set into a recessed section of the facade, marked by a prominent door and adjacent windows. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of modern suburban or urban residential architecture.
description: A single-story, brick-clad house with a flat roof, large white-framed windows, and a functional, modern layout. The structure features multiple rooms and a prominent main entryway.
description_view_0: This view highlights the long facade with multiple large windows and the main entryway set into a recessed section.
description_view_1: This angle shows the rear and side of the house, revealing additional windows and the internal room divisions.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the opposite long facade, with more large windows and a clear view of the internal layout.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the side and rear, showing the arrangement of rooms and the secondary entry points.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with adjacent windows, no porch or columns, simple and functional design
